title: Witch Hat Atelier
description: This is a Witch Hat Atelier Anime Themed Pack
body:
Introduction: This GUI-only resource pack is themed around the show "Witch Hat Atelier" You can use it with other resource packs by placing it on top.

## Hightlight

![Menu Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8eDRcsBZ/images/7740c7cfdf4d1fc96d3aa5648b8119cf1a1f9f9e.png)

**Additional Resources:**
- Check out more content on [My Website](https://serkan00900.github.io/Anime-packs/)
- Join our [Discord](https://serkan00900.github.io/Anime-packs/) server to suggest new packs, vote on upcoming designs, and join anime discussions.
Thank you for your support! ❤️
